## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Related Issues

Closes:

## Verification

- [ ] Focused tests added or updated
- [ ] `python -m pytest tests -q`
- [ ] `ruff check src tests`
- [ ] Database tests used a disposable database
- [ ] No credentials, databases, model caches, or build artifacts included
- [ ] Documentation updated for user-visible behavior

## Risk

Describe migrations, compatibility changes, data-outcome setback risk, network access, or external downloads.
